content:
Cancer November 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Reopen the joy, restore the depths
Key Dates Venus + Mercury station direct Nov 13 / New Moon Nov 8 (Scorpio, 5th house) / Mars conjunct Jupiter Nov 16 (Leo, your 2nd) / Gemini Beaver Full Moon Nov 24 (12th house)
Love Scorpio New Moon in your 5th house is the year’s biggest romance and creativity fresh start — a fellow water sign’s New Moon
Career Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 2nd house is a money and self-worth peak; the 12th house Full Moon asks for rest
Crystal of the Month Obsidian
Lucky Colors Deep black, moonlit silver, soft sea-green
Lucky Number 5
Affirmation I reopen the joy October’s review freed; I restore the depths it softened.

This Month’s Energy

Cancer, November 2026 reopens the joy and restores the depths. Venus and Mercury both station direct on November 13, releasing October’s retrograde season. The New Moon in Scorpio on November 8 falls in your 5th house of romance, creativity, play, and children — a fellow water sign’s New Moon, the year’s loudest joy new beginning. Then November 16 brings Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53′ Leo, your 2nd house of money, body, and self-worth — a peak money and value moment. November 24 brings the Beaver Full Moon in Gemini, your 12th house of rest, closure, and the unconscious — a moment of completion and release. November’s pattern: reopen the joy early, restore the depths late.

Key Dates for Cancer in November 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Cancer Do / Avoid
Nov 8 New Moon in Scorpio (water sign — your 5th house) 5th house — fresh start in romance, creativity, play, children; a fellow water sign’s New Moon resonates deeply with your emotional body Do: make the art, go on the date, schedule the play, ship the creative work
Avoid: postponing joy until the work is perfect
Nov 13 Venus + Mercury station direct Station day — the retrograde season ends; clarity returns to romance, creativity, and communication Do: send the message that was waiting, ship the creative draft, move forward on the date
Avoid: rushing decisions in the 3 days around the station
Nov 16 Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53′ Leo 2nd house — money, possessions, body, self-worth peak; a once-every-two-years amplification of value Do: set the price, claim the raise, organize the finances, address the body’s worth
Avoid: undervaluing the work or impulsive big-ticket spending
Nov 24 Beaver Full Moon in Gemini 12th house — climax around rest, closure, dreams, the unconscious; something long-unseen reaches a turning point and asks to be released Do: rest, journal, attend to dreams, release what’s complete
Avoid: forcing clarity on what hasn’t finished yet
Nov 22 Sun enters Sagittarius 6th house season — work, routine, health through late December Do: organize the systems, refine the routine, schedule the wellness
Avoid: spreading across too many commitments
Early Nov Mars moves through Leo (your 2nd) Money and self-worth stay active; the run-up to Nov 16 builds the value momentum Do: organize the finances, refine the value story, address the body’s needs
Avoid: conflating self-worth with net worth

Career & Money

For Cancer, November’s money story peaks at Mars conjunct Jupiter. The November 16 conjunction in your 2nd house of income and self-worth is a once-every-two-years money and value moment. Set the price; claim the raise; organize the finances.

The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 5th house) handles creative work — the art, the project, the play. Venus and Mercury stationing direct on November 13 releases the creative and writing blocks. The Sun entering Sagittarius (your 6th house) on November 22 opens the work and routine season. The Gemini Full Moon on November 24 (your 12th house) asks for rest over push. Crystals for wealth can support the value claim; the practical move is reopen the joy, restore the depths.

Love & Relationships

The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 in your 5th house of romance is the love signature of the month — and Scorpio is a fellow water sign, so this New Moon resonates deeply with your emotional body. After October’s Venus retrograde review, this is the green light for reopening joy.

Venus stationing direct on November 13 releases the romance review. Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 2nd house on November 16 amps self-worth — the foundation of every bond. The Gemini Full Moon on November 24 (your 12th house) asks for rest and release of unseen patterns. Crystals for love can support the reopening; the deeper practice is letting the joy lead, with the worth as foundation.

Health & Wellness

November’s wellness story emphasizes the chest, stomach, and emotional body. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 5th house) invites play as medicine. The Gemini Full Moon on November 24 (your 12th house) is the wellness climax — rest, sleep, and dream work matter now.

Obsidian, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with grounding, protection, the release of old emotional patterns, and truth-telling — a useful symbolic companion for a Moon-ruled water sign emerging from a retrograde season. Cancer often carries tension in the chest, stomach, and breasts; gentle breathwork, warm baths, and home-cooked food are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Obsidian

Why Obsidian fits Cancer this month. You are Moon-ruled — your reflex is to feel, to absorb, to merge. November asks you to reopen the joy while staying grounded through a money peak and a rest climax. Obsidian — volcanic glass, deep black — is traditionally tied to grounding, protection, the release of old emotional patterns, and truth-telling. Where Moonstone would deepen and Rose Quartz would soften, Obsidian shields and clarifies. Perfect for the 5th house Scorpio New Moon (reopen the joy) and the 12th house Gemini Full Moon (restore the depths).

How to use it during November 2026. Place Obsidian under your pillow or on your nightstand from November 8 onward (the Scorpio New Moon). Carry it during any money conversation around November 16.

Best date to use it: November 24, the Gemini Beaver Full Moon in your 12th house — hold Obsidian at your root for 5 minutes before sleep, releasing what the retrograde surfaced and the depths no longer need to carry.

Read more: Obsidian Meaning and Best Crystals for Cancer.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Cancer — November 2026

When: November 24, the Gemini Beaver Full Moon in your 12th house.
Crystal: Obsidian.
Intention: Release what the joy has outgrown.

  1. Cleanse Obsidian under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of November 8 (the Scorpio New Moon). Place it under your pillow or on your nightstand through November 8.
  2. Set the intention between the New Moon and the Full Moon (November 8–24): write down three joys you’re reopening — and one piece of depth you’re ready to release at the Full Moon.
  3. Act at the Beaver Full Moon on November 24: rest, journal, release what’s complete. Obsidian in your pocket or under your pillow during the act.
  4. Reflect at the Cancer Full Moon in January 2027 (your 1st house): how has the release clarified the joy? Hold Obsidian during the review.

Shop Cancer Crystals for November 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Cancer crystal guide for stones connected with grounding, protection, emotional release, and joy — including the Obsidian that shields the watery depths during a joy-reopening season. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Cancer November 2026

Is November 2026 a good month for Cancer?

It’s a joy-and-rest month. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 5th house, a fellow water sign) is the year’s biggest romance and creativity fresh start. Venus and Mercury station direct on November 13. The Mars conjunct Jupiter on November 16 (your 2nd house) is a money and self-worth peak. The Gemini Full Moon on November 24 (your 12th house) is rest and release.

How will the Scorpio New Moon on November 8 affect Cancer?

It falls in your 5th house of romance, creativity, and play — and Scorpio is a fellow water sign, so the resonance is deep. After October’s Venus retrograde review, this New Moon is the green light for reopening joy.

What does the Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 mean for Cancer?

It falls in your 12th house of rest, closure, and the unconscious — a moment of completion and release. Rest; journal; attend to dreams; let go of what the retrograde surfaced and you no longer need to carry.

What is the best crystal for Cancer in November 2026?

Obsidian — it shields the watery depths during joy-reopening, exactly what a 5th house Scorpio New Moon (reopen the joy) plus a 12th house Gemini Full Moon (restore the depths) demand. See the full Cancer crystal guide →

Why does Mars conjunct Jupiter in my 2nd house matter for Cancer?

The November 16 conjunction in your 2nd house of money, body, and self-worth is a once-every-two-years amplification of value. Set the price; claim the raise; organize the finances — the worth is the foundation of every bond this month.
